summary: Comprehensive testing of Yoga and Avatar features. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified working correctly including navigation, yoga styles, sequences, poses, avatar creator with 3D canvas, and save functionality.
seed_data_creation: None required - yoga styles are hardcoded in backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Yoga and Avatar features fully tested. All 7 yoga styles (hatha, vinyasa, kundalini, yin, restorative, pranayama, nidra) with sequences and poses verified. Avatar creator with 3D canvas preview and all customization options (body type, aura color, intensity, pose, robe style, robe color, glow style, particle density, energy trails) working correctly.

yoga_backend.GET /api/yoga/styles: Returns 7 yoga styles with correct structure
yoga_backend.GET /api/yoga/style/hatha: Returns style with 2 sequences and poses
yoga_backend.GET /api/yoga/style/vinyasa: Returns style with sequences and poses
yoga_backend.auth_protection: Yoga complete and history endpoints properly require authentication

yoga_frontend.style_cards: All 7 yoga style cards displayed with correct data-testid
yoga_frontend.style_detail: Clicking style shows detail view with sequences
yoga_frontend.sequence_view: Clicking sequence shows poses with Guided Meditation button
yoga_frontend.pose_list: Poses displayed with name, duration, and expandable details

avatar_frontend.page_loads: Avatar Creator page (/avatar) loads with data-testid='avatar-creator-page'
avatar_frontend.canvas_preview: 3D canvas preview renders avatar with data-testid='avatar-preview-canvas'
avatar_frontend.save_button: Save Avatar button works with data-testid='save-avatar-btn'
avatar_frontend.toast_notification: Success toast 'Avatar saved!' appears after save
avatar_frontend.settings_persistence: Avatar settings persist after page reload

navigation.yoga_link: Yoga link found in More dropdown (data-testid='nav-more-yoga')
navigation.avatar_link: Avatar link found in More dropdown (data-testid='nav-more-avatar')

frontend_ui_tested: Navigation More dropdown contains Yoga and Avatar links
Yoga page loads with 7 yoga style cards
Each yoga style card has correct data-testid (yoga-style-{id})
Clicking Hatha style shows detail view with 2 sequences
Clicking sequence shows pose list with 8 poses
Poses have expandable details with instruction, breath, focus
Guided Meditation button present in sequence view
Avatar Creator page loads with 3D canvas preview
Avatar customization controls: body type, aura color, intensity slider, pose, robe style, robe color, glow style, particle density, energy trails toggle
Save Avatar button triggers API call and shows success toast
Avatar settings persist after page reload
